proposed_html:
§ 200.477
Abortion.

Costs associated with elective abortions are unallowable, except as expressly authorized by Federal law.
diff_html:
This section is newly added by the proposed rule; there is no current eCFR counterpart, so the full text is shown as an addition.

1 paragraph changed · 1 addition

Costs associated with elective abortions are unallowable, except as expressly authorized by Federal law.
